title: College financial handbook
body: " The Education and Skills Funding Agency (ESFA) closed on 31 March 2025. All activity has moved to the Department for Education (DfE). You should continue to follow this guidance.   Colleges must comply with this handbook as a condition of their accountability agreement.  Read this handbook if you have responsibility for governing, managing or auditing a college or college group.  It is for:   college governors accounting officers chief financial officers governance professionals auditors   To provide feedback about this handbook or to contact DfE for guidance, use the customer help portal. "

taxons.title: Financial management for further education providers
